scenario: Duplicate charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the unplugged, open charging case
description_clean: Repeat charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the unplugged, open charging case. Expected: only one charging notification since only one earbud is charging.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure both earbuds are connected to the app via Bluetooth.
3. Wear one earbud (e.g., the right earbud) in your ear.
4. Place the other earbud (e.g., the left earbud) into the charging case.
5. Ensure the charging case is unplugged (not connected to a power source).
6. Observe the charging notifications that appear on the Android device.
expected: Only one charging notification should appear, since only one earbud is placed in the charging case and is charging.
actual: Repeat charging notifications appear continuously or multiple times, even though only one earbud is charging.
